items.title: Company announces expanded data center partnership
items.summary: The company expanded a data center partnership that could support future accelerator demand.

items.title: Analysts debate valuation after recent rally
items.summary: Several analysts highlighted strong growth but warned that valuation leaves less room for disappointment.

items.title: Sector report notes possible supply bottlenecks
items.summary: A sector report flagged supply constraints as a risk for near-term delivery schedules.

observations: Recent news flow includes one positive partnership item.
Valuation concerns are present but not tied to a company-specific negative event.
Supply constraints should be monitored as an execution risk.
